title: tina chapelieriana
intro: Tina chapelieriana, also known as Tina, is a plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the family of Rutaceae, commonly referred to as the citrus family. The medicinal properties of Tina chapelieriana lie in its essential oils, which have been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tina chapelieriana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Tina chapelieriana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
